description.en:
Adds 14 new cow breeds with texture variation to Realistic Livestock RM.
Dairy: Red Holstein, Ayrshire, Jersey, Guernsey, Kerry, Shorthorn Milkers. Beef: Red Angus, Hereford, Charolais, Shorthorn, Irish Moiled, British Blue, Belted Galloway, Simmental.
Requires Realistic Livestock - Ritter version (FS25_RealisticLivestockRM).
description.de:
Fuegt 14 neue Rinderrassen mit Texturvariationen zu Realistic Livestock RM hinzu.
Milch: Red Holstein, Ayrshire, Jersey, Guernsey, Kerry, Shorthorn Milkers. Fleisch: Red Angus, Hereford, Charolais, Shorthorn, Irish Moiled, British Blue, Belted Galloway, Simmental.
Benoetigt Realistic Livestock - Ritter version (FS25_RealisticLivestockRM).
